info.name: Snowflake Services API
info.description:
The Snowflake Services API is a REST API that you can use to access, update, and perform certain actions on Services resource in a Snowflake database.

Contact Support:
 Name: Snowflake, Inc.
 Email: support@snowflake.com

query.description: (Required) ID of the service instance, starting with 0.
(Required) Container name as specified in the service specification file.
Number of trailing log lines to retrieve.

request.description: Fetch the logs for a given service.

Number of seconds to wait for the service to reach a steady state (for example, READY) before returning the status. If the service does not reach a steady state within the specified time, Snowflake returns the current state.

request.description: Fetch the status for a given service.

response.name: Successful request

request.description: Delete a service with the given name. If ifExists is used, the operation will succeed even if the object does not exist. Otherwise, there will be a failure if the drop is unsuccessful.

variable.value: reference ./common.yaml#/components/schemas/Identifier not found in the OpenAPI spec
variable.description: (Required) Name of the service that contains the service role.

request.description: List all the grants of the service role

variable.value: reference ./common.yaml#/components/schemas/Identifier not found in the OpenAPI spec
variable.description: (Required) Name of the service that contains the service role.

request.description: List all the grants given to the service role
Lists the services under the database and schema.

response.name: successful

query.description: Query parameter allowing support for different modes of resource creation. Possible values include: - `errorIfExists`: Throws an error if you try to create a resource that already exists. - `ifNotExists`: Creates a new resource when an alter is requested for a non-existent resource.

request.description: Create a service, with standard create modifiers as query parameters. See the Service component definition for what is required to be provided in the request body.

body.raw:
{
  "name": {
    "value": "reference ./common.yaml#/components/schemas/Identifier not found in the OpenAPI spec"
  },
  "compute_pool": "<string>",
  "spec": {
    "spec_type": "<string>"
  },
